This concept has no inbound references from any artifact. It exists to test low-risk auto-deprecation when the curator detects an unreferenced active concept.

## Details

No design files, conventions, or other concepts link to this artifact. The curator should be able to deprecate it under `auto_low` autonomy without confirmation.
